content: SAM2 supports device='mps' via torch.backends.mps.is_available() but MPS support is officially 'preliminary' per Meta's own notebook warning; SAM2 was trained on CUDA and can give numerically different/degraded results on MPS. GitHub issue #687 (M4 Mac, 2025-2026) reports RuntimeError 'Placeholder storage has not been allocated on MPS device!' even after SAM2_BUILD_CUDA=0 install, unresolved as of query. CPU fallback works but is slow for large images. Recommendation: attempt MPS first with try/except fallback to CPU, and prefer the smaller sam2.1_hiera_small/base_plus checkpoints over hiera_large for interactive single-click use to keep per-click latency low.
